script.title: Inference Radar — 2026-06-25
script.intro: Blackwell PRs accelerated; sglang shipped TBO in main.

slides.heading: Picks
bullets: D3 · vLLM #46721 · b200 · [Bug]: Out of Resource / block size error Kimi K2.7 on SM120 Blackwell with kv_c
D3 · vLLM #46726 · b200 · [Bug]: sparse-MLA indexer error with  GLM 5.2 NVFP4 on RTX 6000 Pro SM120
D5 · vLLM #46707 · deepseek · [RFC]: Support for Domino speculative decoding in vLLM
D4 · vLLM #46679 · deepseek · [Bug]: GLM5.2 RuntimeError: The expanded size of the tensor (10210) must match t
D2 · CUTLASS #3348 · cutlass_cute · [BUG] Allow boolean types for sm100_utils.make_smem_layout_epi
D3 · vLLM #43141 · deepseek · [Bug]: Deepseek v4 ImportError: cannot import name 'Arch' from 'cutlass.base_dsl
D4 · SGLang #29123 · deepseek · Gloo timeout deadlock in disaggregated decode DP attention (all_gather_into_tens
D4 · SGLang #29152 · deepseek · [Bug] deepseek-v4-pro pd disaggregation
slides.narration: Picks include vLLM issues related to Blackwell and DeepSeek, as well as CUTLASS and SGLang issues. These issues cover a range of topics, including out of resource errors, sparse-MLA indexer errors, and Gloo timeout deadlocks.

script.title: Inference Radar — 2026-06-19
script.intro: FlashInfer issues picked for DeepSeek and CUTLASS.

slides.heading: Picks
bullets: D3 · FlashInfer #1452 · deepseek · Profiler error — The issue is about a profiler error with DeepSeek MLA decode
D3 · FlashInfer #1646 · cutlass_cute · Using cutlass_fused_moe get NaNs in tensor — The issue is about using cutlass_fused_moe and getting NaNs in the tensor
D4 · FlashInfer #2597 · b200 · FlashInfer is missing TRTLLM-GEN ragged kernel for BF16/FP16 -> FP8 output
D3 · FlashAttention #2665 · cutlass_cute · [Cute,FA4,Fwd,Sm100] Correctness issue when QKV is non-contiguous on SM100 for h
D4 · vLLM #43906 · b200 · [Bug] MXFP8 MoE always falls back to MARLIN on SM_121
D4 · FlashInfer #2859 · deepseek · when I use mtp with trtllm_mla，the attention performance drop 90%
D4 · FlashInfer #2883 · deepseek · [Bug] trtllm_batch_decode_with_kv_cache_mla writes NaNs in CUDAGraph padded regi
D4 · FlashInfer #1669 · cutlass_cute · DeepSeek FP8 Block Scaling is not yet implemented in CUTLASS fused_moe
slides.narration: Picks include FlashInfer issues for DeepSeek and CUTLASS, such as profiler errors, NaNs in tensors, missing kernels, correctness issues, and performance drops.
